---
title: "groupBcode"
format: html
---

What can be done to improve this code?

`#create an object storing a vector repeating the character term "Ipomoea" 4 times`{style="color: green"}

`genus<-rep(4, "Ipomoea")`

`#create another vector object with the following character objects:`{style="color: green"}

- `tricolor`{style="color: green"}

- `alba`{style="color: green"}

- `indica`{style="color: green"}

- `batatas`{style="color: green"}

`c(tricolor, alba, indica, batatas)`

`#create a vector object that concatenates the text from the first object with that of the second object (so that each term has a genus and a species`{style="color: green"}

`fullName<-genus + species`
